name: JST-SH 2-Pin SMD Header (SM02B-SRSS-TB)
description: JST SH series 2-position 1.0mm pitch side-entry surface-mount header, 1A per contact, 50V AC/DC, tin-plated copper alloy contacts, LCP housing, friction-fit, mates with SHR-02V-S housing, used in drones, sensors, LEDs, camera gimbals, Qwiic-compatible boards

name: 5.5x2.1mm PCB-Mount Barrel Jack (PJ-002A)
description: CUI Devices PJ-002A 5.5mm x 2.1mm DC barrel jack, PCB through-hole mount, right-angle, 2.5A rated, 24V DC, 3-pin (center, sleeve, switch), standard DC power input for 12V electronics, 3D printers, LED drivers, Arduino, Raspberry Pi power supplies
designNotes: Standard PCB-mount barrel jack for 12V DC wall adapters. Center-positive is the convention — verify adapter polarity. 3 pins: center (tip), sleeve (ring/GND), and normally-closed switch (opens when plug inserted — use for battery disconnect). Fits standard 5.5x2.1mm barrel plugs. For higher current (>2.5A), use screw terminals instead.

name: 5.5x2.1mm Panel-Mount Barrel Jack (RAPC722X)
description: Switchcraft RAPC722X 5.5mm x 2.1mm DC barrel jack, panel mount with nut, 5A rated, 12V DC, solder lug terminals, threaded bushing with hex nut, 8mm panel hole, standard DC power input for enclosures and chassis
designNotes: Panel-mount barrel jack for project enclosures. Drill 8mm hole, insert from inside, secure with included hex nut from outside. Solder lug terminals — use ring terminals or direct solder. Center-positive convention. Higher current rating (5A) than PCB-mount variant. Thread is M9x0.75. Add strain relief to internal wiring.

name: 5.5x2.5mm PCB-Mount Barrel Jack (PJ-002B)
description: CUI Devices 5.5mm x 2.5mm DC barrel jack, PCB through-hole mount, right-angle, 2.5A rated, 24V DC, 3-pin, for laptop-style power adapters and higher-power applications, slightly larger center pin than 2.1mm variant
designNotes: Same footprint as PJ-002A but with 2.5mm center pin. Used by some laptop power supplies and higher-power adapters. WARNING: 2.1mm and 2.5mm plugs are NOT interchangeable — a 2.1mm plug will make unreliable contact in a 2.5mm jack. Verify your power adapter pin diameter before selecting. Otherwise identical mounting and pinout to 2.1mm variant.

name: 5.5x2.5mm Panel-Mount Barrel Jack
description: 5.5mm x 2.5mm DC barrel jack, panel mount with nut, 5A rated, 12V DC, solder lug terminals, threaded bushing, 8mm panel hole, for enclosures requiring 2.5mm center pin compatibility
designNotes: Panel-mount barrel jack with 2.5mm center pin. Same mounting as 2.1mm panel-mount variant (8mm panel hole, M9 thread). Used primarily for laptop-style power adapters (19V, 24V). Verify adapter compatibility before specifying — most hobby/maker 12V adapters use 2.1mm, not 2.5mm.

name: USB-C Breakout Board (Adafruit 4090)
description: Adafruit USB Type-C breakout board, exposes VBUS, GND, CC1, CC2, D+, D- pins to 0.1" header holes, 5.1k ohm CC resistors for default USB-C current (5V/1.5A), no PD negotiation, 2x M2.5 mounting holes, breadboard-friendly

specs.description: VBUS, GND, CC1, CC2, D+, D-

electrical.pinout: VBUS, GND, CC1, CC2, D+, D- (0.1" headers)

designNotes: Simple pass-through breakout — no voltage regulation, no PD negotiation. Gets 5V/1.5A from any USB-C source via built-in 5.1k CC resistors. For >5V (9V, 12V, 20V PD), add a PD sink controller (STUSB4500 or CYPD3177 breakout). D+/D- exposed for data if needed. Mount with M2.5 screws or solder directly to perfboard. Pair with USB-C cable for modern power input on projects replacing barrel jacks.

name: Micro-USB Breakout Board (Adafruit 1833)
description: Adafruit Micro-B USB breakout board, exposes VBUS, D-, D+, ID, GND pins to 0.1" header holes, simple pass-through with no regulation, breadboard-compatible, for USB power input or data tap

electrical.pinout: VBUS, D-, D+, ID, GND (0.1" headers)

designNotes: Simple pass-through — no regulation. Use for quick USB power tap or data breakout. Micro-USB is legacy but still found on many devices. For new designs, prefer USB-C breakout. VBUS provides 5V from USB host (500mA USB 2.0, up to 1.5A with USB BC1.2 charger). ID pin is for OTG detection — leave floating for normal device mode.

name: USB-A Panel Mount Cable (Adafruit 908)
description: Adafruit USB-A panel-mount bulkhead cable, female USB-A flush-mount on panel side to male USB-A on device side, 30cm (12 inch) cable, two screw mounting holes, USB 2.0, for project enclosures and control panels

electrical.pinout: USB-A female (panel) to USB-A male (device), 30cm cable

designNotes: Cable assembly for bringing USB-A port to an enclosure panel. Drill or cut a standard USB-A rectangular cutout (13x6mm) plus two M3 mounting holes at 24mm spacing. Panel-side connector sits flush. 30cm cable reaches most internal mounting points. USB 2.0 only — not suitable for USB 3.0 speeds. For USB-C panel mount, see Adafruit 4218.
